summary: Full M1.2-buffers implementation complete. All 192 workspace tests pass; cargo clippy -D warnings clean.

lexer.description: Added 7 GPU keyword mappings in keyword_from_str(): buffer, readonly_buffer, writeonly_buffer, shared, barrier, kernel, subgroup_uniform. Added 4 new tests.

parser.description: Rewrote parse_params() to actually parse name:type_ref pairs. Added parse_buffer_elem(), buffer TypeRef support, index assign stmt, postfix [expr] index on identifiers, and recovery helper. Added 10 new M1.2 parser tests.

hir_buffer.description: New module: BufferAccess (ReadWrite/ReadOnly/WriteOnly), BufferTy struct with elem_byte_size(). 4 tests.

hir_param.description: New module: Ty enum, KernelParam, BufferBindingSlot, ScalarPushConstantSlot, ParamBindingPlan, BindingPlanError, compute_binding_plan, MAX_PUSH_CONSTANT_BYTES=128. 8 tests.

hir_expr.description: Added BufferRead, GidBuiltin expr kinds; BufferWrite stmt kind.

hir_hir.description: Updated Kernel struct with params: Vec<KernelParam> and binding_plan: ParamBindingPlan.

hir_typecheck.description: Added 13 new TypecheckError variants. Updated TypeChecker with params field and find_param(). Updated typecheck_kernel_body signature. Added check_index_assign_stmt, check_buffer_read, check_gid_call, count_buffer_position. Scalar param reads use sentinel BindingId(u32::MAX-pos).

hir_lower.description: Updated lower_module to call lower_params(), lower_type_ref(), lower_scalar_type_ref(). Kernel struct construction now includes params and binding_plan.

hir_validate.description: Added BindingPlan and UnsupportedParamType HirError variants. Fixed test helper make_module() for new Kernel fields.

codegen_buffers.description: New module: emit_buffer_globals (SSBO with ArrayStride/Block/DescriptorSet/Binding/NonWritable/NonReadable), emit_push_constant_block (Block/Offset), emit_gid_variable (BuiltIn GlobalInvocationId). BufferBindings, PushConstantBlock, GlobalInvocationIdVar structs. 8 tests.

codegen_body.description: Added KernelResources struct. Updated emit_kernel_body to accept KernelResources. Added emit_buffer_read, emit_buffer_write, emit_gid_component, emit_scalar_param_read. Updated LocalRead handling to detect sentinel BindingIds.

codegen_emit.description: Updated Typed branch to emit global vars (SSBO/push-const/gid) before begin_block, build KernelResources, and include gid_var in EntryPoint interface list. Added body_uses_gid scanner. Fixed too_many_kernels_error test helper.

examples.description: saxpy: Y[i] = alpha*X[i] + Y[i] with push-constants (u32 n, f32 alpha) and 2 buffer bindings. vector_add: C[i] = A[i] + B[i] with push-constant (u32 n) and 3 buffer bindings.

integration_test.description: AT-201: Compile saxpy.axc and assert OpVariable StorageBuffer, OpVariable PushConstant, OpVariable Input, OpDecorate Block, Binding 0/1, ArrayStride. spirv-val optional.

spirv_val: not available on PATH; spirv-val assertions skipped (not CI)

hard_rules.no_raw_opcodes: All SPIR-V emission via rspirv typed API (Builder methods, Decoration/BuiltIn/StorageClass enums)
hard_rules.memory_limit: No test executables created beyond normal unit/integration tests
hard_rules.deterministic: BTreeMap not needed (single kernel, deterministic binding_plan ordering from params Vec)
